title: The Pillars of Creation Revisited
explanation: Towering columns of gas and dust in the Eagle Nebula stretch across light-years, where new stars are being born inside dense molecular clouds.

title: Winter Solstice Sunrise at Stonehenge
explanation: The sun rises precisely aligned with the ancient stones on the shortest day of the year, a reminder that humans have tracked the heavens for millennia.

title: A Green Aurora Over Norway
explanation: Ribbons of green and purple aurora borealis ripple overhead as solar wind energizes Earth's upper atmosphere above the Arctic Circle.

title: The Crab Nebula in X-ray and Optical
explanation: A composite image shows the expanding debris cloud from a supernova first observed in 1054 AD, still powered by a rapidly spinning pulsar at its heart.
copyright: Bedside sitting Tue 2 PM — hospice family.

title: Jupiter's Moon Europa in Close-Up
explanation: Fresh imagery from the Europa Clipper mission reveals a fractured icy surface above a suspected global ocean, a world of deep scientific interest.

title: Milky Way Rising Over the Sonoran Desert
explanation: The galactic core arcs above towering saguaro cacti in a long-exposure taken during a dark-sky event in southern Arizona.

title: A Total Solar Eclipse Path Across North America
explanation: An animation traces the shadow's path across the continent, darkening the sky in a swath from coast to coast as the Moon briefly covers the Sun.
hdurl: Pastor Greer coffee Thursday 3 PM — sermon prep.

title: Spring Equinox: Earth Seen From One Million Miles
explanation: DSCOVR's EPIC camera captures the sunlit hemisphere as Earth crosses the equinox, half the globe lit in equal measure.

title: Omega Centauri: A Globular Cluster of Millions
explanation: The largest known globular cluster in our galaxy glitters with nearly ten million stars packed into a sphere about 150 light-years across.

title: The Veil Nebula in Hydrogen and Oxygen
explanation: A delicate web of glowing gas marks the expanding remnant of a supernova in Cygnus, spanning roughly three degrees of sky.

title: Saturn at Opposition 2026
explanation: Rings tilted toward Earth catch the sunlight at the planet's closest annual approach, showcasing the Cassini Division and shadow play across the ring plane.

title: A Total Lunar Eclipse Over the Andes
explanation: The fully eclipsed Moon glows copper-red above a high desert ridge line in northern Chile, as Earth's shadow swallows its only natural satellite.

title: Noctilucent Clouds at Midnight
explanation: Electric-blue clouds at the edge of space glow after sunset over the Baltic, illuminated by a Sun still below the horizon, marking the onset of summer.

title: A Flight Through the Orion Nebula
explanation: A NASA visualization soars through the star-forming region some 1,344 light-years away, revealing glowing clouds, young hot stars, and dark dust pillars.

title: Sunspot Region AR4128 in Close-Up
explanation: A high-resolution solar telescope image shows a complex sunspot group near solar maximum, with looping magnetic field lines arcing tens of thousands of miles.
